MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Stagehouse Lofts is present. Represented by George Houser.
Attorney, Andre Wiegel, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Peter Fader , is present.
Attorney, Amanda Holder-Robinson, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of APR-26-2010 is vacated.
